name: vue-repotest
description: Minimal Vue 3 + Vite fixture (no CSS preprocessors in vite.config). Demonstrates that non-config files are unaffected.

name: vue-scss-app
description: Vue 3 + Vite fixture with SCSS/Less preprocessor additionalData in vite.config.js. Shows precision improvement from both the IGNORE_FILE_PATTERN fix and parseVueConfigFiles.

name: vue-vben-admin
description: Popular Vue 3 enterprise admin dashboard using Vite, sass, and CSS preprocessor additionalData for theming.
notes: Uses sass with additionalData for global variables. Run with --clone-samples.

name: vue-pure-admin
description: Feature-rich Vue 3 admin system built with Vite and Element Plus. Injects SCSS variables globally via additionalData.
notes: Uses sass with additionalData. Run with --clone-samples.

name: naive-ui-admin
description: Vue 3 admin template based on Naive UI and Vite with Less preprocessor configuration.
notes: Uses less with additionalData for global variables. Run with --clone-samples.

name: vue-element-plus-admin
description: Vue 3 + Element Plus admin template, Vite, SCSS with additionalData for global theming variables.
notes: Injects global SCSS variables via additionalData. Run with --clone-samples.
